worker learns that 
the patient's daughter, who is also an insulin dependent diabetic, has come to live with the 
patient because she is out of work. The daughter is now financially dependent on the 
patient for all of her financial needs and has been using the patient's insulin syringes. The 
social worker assesses the patient's financial resources and determines that they are 
adequate to support the patient and meet her own medical needs, but are not sufficient to
